subcodes.first_line: O Nabíl! Upon thee be My greetings! His honor 'Abdu'l-Majíd, who is of the people of fragrance, hath sought permission to turn unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا نبیل علیک سلامى جناب عبد المجید از اهل رائحه اذن توجه خواسته
subcodes.subjects: @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @personal instructions, @prayer for pilgrims
